chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I hate when someone says I can't cook.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I never even went to culinary school, but I've worked in some of the best restaurants in America.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: How'd that happen?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And not to sound like a broken record or the guy from Ratatouille, but anyone can cook.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So I'm going to distill down some of the core essentials to what I know about cooking.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And by the end of this video, mark my words, you will be able to cook

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: so long as you follow the guidelines I'm about to give you.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Starting off with the basics of measuring.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: This is incredibly important because it's the first place most people go wrong.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: How do you measure ingredients to be correct across the board?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Really, there's only two ways you can do that.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Number one, you can go by volumetric measurement.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That would be measuring cups, measuring spoons.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But the other way is purely by weight.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Grams, ounces, kilos.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Normally people are going by weight, though.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: They're probably going by grams.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Scale is ideal for any form of accuracy, and you will 100% need one if you want accurate baking.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now for the more volumetric approach with cups and spoons, what matters is how you scoop.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Everybody does it a little different, but I use the scoop and level method.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Here's how you do it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You scoop it up, cup or spoon, and then using the back of the knife, scrape the top and level it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Different recipes require different things, but if you have both, you'll always be prepared to measure anything.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Next, let's talk about setup, otherwise known as mise en place.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Translation, somewhere along the lines of everything in its place.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Whatever recipe you follow, you need to identify and organize equipment and ingredients.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That means pre-measure and separate everything on a tray, then execute the recipe.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Is this an absolute necessity?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: No, but it increases the chances of having successful execution of a recipe substantially.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Although it adds more things to clean, it does make cleaning up a little bit more organized.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: All right, at this point, we're ready to get cooking, but Josh, what kind of pans do you like to cook in?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I'm glad you asked.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: There's a large variety of pans that you can use when you're cooking, but my ideal choice is stainless steel,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: which is why I'm happy to talk to you about today's sponsor, Maiden's Stainless Steel Collection.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Despite the fact that they're a sponsor, I've actually been using their equipment for years, before I was even a partner of theirs.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Of course, you can spend $2 on a beat-up pan that you find at a garage sale,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: but good quality stainless steel like this here will last you years, maybe even a lifetime if you take good care of it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And they're extremely versatile for all types of cooking.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Maiden's Stainless line has fantastic heat retention, thanks to their 5-ply stainless steel for even heating.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Not to mention their stainless is used in thousands of restaurants worldwide, including multi-Michelin star kitchens.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So you can be confident that they're gonna last for you if they're lasting for those guys.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So be sure to check out their cookware in the link in the description to save on your order.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now, moving on.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Next up, knives.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: We're gonna talk about what knives you need and how to properly use a knife.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Let's start with your must-have knives.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Step one, absolutely no knife sets ever, period.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: They're typically way too expensive, and you're usually only gonna use like maybe one, maybe two out of the five, six, seven knives you get.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Not a great bang for your buck, in my honest opinion.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But if you have budget for three knives, here are the three top knives I would pick.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: One 8-10 inch chef knife.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: One serrated knife for slicing bread.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: One petty knife, not a paring knife.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's basically a multi-purpose knife.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You can use this for cutting small things, peeling things.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But if you can only have one singular knife and you really want to invest in a good one, make it the chef knife.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The first place people go wrong is how they hold the knife.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I've said this many times and I'm excited to tell you again.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: A lot of people do this, right?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You're holding the knife.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You have no control over this thing.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: This thing could go anywhere.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I don't know what the...

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Very simple process, all right?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Here's the spine of the knife.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Thumb on one side and index finger on the other.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You're now hinching it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: What do I do with these three fingers?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: They're just gonna go around the handle like that.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Here's the thing.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You're probably gonna be like, oh, this feels awkward.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Move your hand around, make it feel comfortable.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Move the knife around until it falls into place.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's like, oh, that feels pretty natural.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now you have control over the knife.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: At that stage, you have something to do with the other hand.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Form a claw with your hand like you're gonna scratch somebody with the middle finger out as far as possible.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Second thing you're gonna do is turn your elbow out like this.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The side of your knife goes against that knuckle and you're just gonna stay on that knuckle whenever you're cutting anything.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: As you go, you can pick up speed.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You can try different techniques.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But there are many knife cuts that you really need to know to get started.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Let's talk about a chop.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: A chop is more of a loose term and the goal is to get it sort of square-ish.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: A rough chop focuses a little bit less on uniformity and more just getting it into bite-sized pieces best you can.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Typically, this would be used maybe in a soup and you're in a rush or it's something that's gonna get blended so it doesn't matter what it looks like.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: A fine chop would just be slightly smaller than that.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And finally, a mince.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: This is when you just keep on chopping it up until it's borderline a paste.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Many uses for that.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That moves me on to the next bit, which is sort of like a more clinical version, which would be a dice.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You'll take an onion that's been cut in half through the root, with the root still attached, cut towards the root, starting on one end, and separating each cut about a half inch each.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Optionally, about halfway through the onion, you can cut across towards the root.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That just helps separate the segments of the onion a little bit more evenly.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And then now, cut against the grain at equal half-inch distances to get equally sized diced onion.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Of course, there's medium and large dices, but there's also a small dice.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And if you go even smaller than a small dice, that's a brunoise.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Then there's the baton.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: To make it simple, you'll start off by taking a large thick vegetable, cut it into planks.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: In the case of a baton, it's about a half-inch thick.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And then you're gonna cut half-inch thick segments lengthwise across that plank like so.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You have batons.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You want a batonette?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Make those cuts closer together and equal to the thickness of your plank.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So if the plank has now gone from a half-inch to a quarter-inch, then your cuts should be a quarter-inch apart to get batonettes.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The thinner you go, the closer you get to a julienne, which looks like this.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It all starts with a base cut and gets smaller or larger from there.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now, a chiffonade, you might not see used as often, but it is a great technique when it comes to getting really fine, nice threads of herbs.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The easiest way to do a chiffonade is to take large herbs.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: In this case, we have large leaves of basil.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Stack them on top of each other.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Roll them up nice and tight like a cigar, as Gordon Ramsay would say.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And slice along the entire length of that quote-unquote cigar as thinly as possible.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And you end up with these nice, fine little threads.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: There are more specific types of knife cuts, but everything after that is typically just a different size.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But if you know those basic ones, you'll mostly be covered for the general recipes that are out there.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Go slow, do it over and over and over and over and over and over and over and over and over.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And you'll get better.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Number four, ingredients.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Two things matter when picking ingredients, freshness and quality.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: When you're about to commit a bunch of time and energy towards this, how can you expect a strong outcome with a weak starting point?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Here's how you find fresh and quality ingredients.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Number one, Google is your friend.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Every ingredient is different and exhibits qualities of freshness in many, many ways.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And we're not going to be able to explain them all here, so be sure to Google it first before you buy it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That said, here are some general cues to look for.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: For meats and seafood, generally speaking, you don't want a stinky odor.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: If you go over there and it smells like formaldehyde or ammonia or like a fart, using your nose is always a good place to start for freshness.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Second, visual and physical cues.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Take any vegetable, especially one with lots of layers like an onion or cabbage, it should be tightly wound, not loose or falling apart.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The color should be bright and it shouldn't have any marring, bruising and obviously no visible mold.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Typically, the more colorful an ingredient, the fresher it is.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now, that's not always true, but if it is dull in color or graying or even sweating, that might indicate a lack of freshness.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: For fruit, you're looking for just under peak ripeness.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Every fruit shows ripeness differently.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Once you learn the cues, pick just under that when you purchase because it will ripen on your counter.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: For example, a ripe mango looks like this.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It should be a bit soft to the touch, should give a bit when you press it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: If you pop it on the top, it smells fresh of mango and it should not be rock hard.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You're only going to learn through repetition.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That is how you get great in really anything, honestly, but especially the kitchen.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But once you have a foundation of understanding freshness of ingredients, you can focus on the unsung heroes of every kitchen.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: A stocked pantry.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Pantry essentials.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Pantry essentials may sound mundane and they kind of are, but they're also important to having a properly stocked pantry.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The benefit of it is you always have what you need all the time, no matter what.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's the difference between an average meal and a great one because you have that special ingredient that you love to use.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Pantry essentials are based off of what you would be frequently using.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: They're essentials.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: They're things you need to have nearby you at all times, no matter what.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: No fail.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That means you would kind of determine that.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But here are some general things that probably everybody should have.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Kosher salt.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Some sort of a flaky salt like Maldon.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Vegetable oil for high heat cooking or emulsifying like making mayos.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Olive oil, either for cooking, making pastas, dressings.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Black pepper.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Butter.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And one of the more unique ones is chili oil.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I feel like everybody has this nowadays, but to me, I have to have it always.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But think about it like this.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You bake a lot.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Sugar and flour, plus any seasonings you like, should probably always be on hand.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Basically, this means stuff you use enough of so that it's always eight arms length away.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So for each person, it'll be a little different.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But if you start with this, you have a good base point for just about anything you want to cook.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Next up, how to season and balance flavor.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: To me, this is hands down the most important.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: There's two pieces.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: When people think seasoning, they're thinking seasonings like spices, garlic powder, paprika, celery powder, so on and so forth.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Those come into play.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But the number one most essential piece to seasoning is salt.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I've said it a million times.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It is single handedly the most influential thing you will use in your kitchen, period.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: End of story.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I don't want to hear anything about it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The simple reality is there are many flavors around the entire globe that are incredible, but none of it would really be that great without the addition of salt.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It enhances flavor.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Why would you not want to use that?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The biggest mistake that most people and even restaurants make is not putting enough salt.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Yes, putting too much as possible.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But I think people get such a scared hand that they end up under seasoning.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Don't be scared.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Add salt to the absolute maximum.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Don't go to the point where it's too salty.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But just before that, the idea that you should only season high quality ingredients lightly with salt or else it will just taste like salt is literally an urban legend.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The simple reality is that salt has a threshold.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It is guaranteed to enhance the flavor of your food the more you add it until you reach that limit.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And that changes depending on what you're cooking.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So obviously, if something is cured like bacon that already has salt in it, then you might need to pull back on that and take that into account.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Let me give you a real life example.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Let's say you're seasoning a sauce and you add a little salt.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You taste it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Tastes good.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Add a tiny bit more.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Taste it again.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Does it taste better?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Because if it does taste better, you need to keep asking yourself, how much more can I add before this just tastes salty?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Major key alert.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Just be sure to taste your food as you go.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now we can talk about spices.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The world of spices is incredibly broad, and I suggest you play with them over time.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And if you want to learn a little bit more about flavor combinations, you should look at the book Flavor Bible.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's incredible.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So salt enhances flavor.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Spices change flavor.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now for the most important part, balancing flavor.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That brings me to the five basic tastes.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Sweet, salty, sour, bitter, and umami.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Most of the time you're going to use a combination of one, maybe two, maybe three.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Some vegetables are naturally bitter.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Some meats are naturally a little sweeter than others.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Here's an example of a dish that is balanced with nearly all five tastes.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And here's how I balance it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I've got a classic Tom Kha Gai soup here.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now I want this soup to be sour.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I want it to have a nice salty umami kick.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I want some sweetness and I want some spice.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So how do we get there?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So the first thing I'm going to do is when I make it, I'm going to taste it and think about all four flavors.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: How they're all tasting.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Maybe it's a little too tart, not salty enough, and missing some sweetness.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Okay, now I know what to do.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I'll add a little fish sauce for that salty kick, which will naturally add some umami.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Good stuff.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I'll add some palm sugar for some sweetness.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Taste it again.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Okay, now I've got the sweetness I want.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now I need a little more acidity.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So I'm going to add a touch of lime juice.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Taste it again.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Okay, now it tastes good, but that lime juice now counterbalanced the salt.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It needs a little bit more fish sauce.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So pop a little more fish sauce.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Taste it again.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Okay, now it's got the salty umami, but I've lost some of the acid.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now we're going to add a little bit more lime juice.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Taste it again.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: This is the act of flavor balancing.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Sometimes it takes longer than you'd think.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: What I will say is on that final taste, boom, there it is.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It has all the levels where I want it to be.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I'm happy and I'm confident to serve this.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And listen, mastering flavor is great, but understanding texture is revolutionary.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: This is what separates someone who's good at cooking and someone who is absolutely mind boggling excellent at cooking.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Hence my cookbook, Texture Over Taste.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: This book will allow every cook, beginner or an expert to unlock true culinary mastery.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I wrote the book to get people to look at food a little bit differently.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: We always think about flavor, flavor, flavor, but we never ask the question about texture.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: What makes a great crunchy French fry?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: What makes the most perfect creamy mashed potato?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's texture, not just flavor.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So if you ever want to get into that, click the link in the description.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's right there.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's also currently running a deal on Amazon.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now onto cooking techniques.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Technique is the number one thing that separates bad cooking from excellent cooking.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Sautéing is a method of cooking that uses a relatively small amount of oil or fat in a shallow pan over relatively high heat.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I would say like medium, sometimes medium high, but typically medium.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But really the goal is to cook the thing in the pan, tossing occasionally until it's just cooked through.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And if it gets a little color, that's totally fine.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: If you're trying to avoid that, you would then be going into a sweat, gently cooking, low heat with no color.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Number two, roasting.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: By definition, roasting is a cooking method that uses dry heat where hot air covers food,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: cooking it evenly on all sides from an open flame or an oven or some other heat source.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: To roast something properly, you want to look for some form of a dry heat.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I prefer convection in an oven if you have it, just because it helps the air circulate around the food better.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The whole goal is to dry the exterior in a way that you get a beautiful, nice browning on the exterior and perfectly cooked on the inside.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Whether that means that it needs to be brought to a medium rare or if it's a vegetable, it's soft but not too soft.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: There are many roasting techniques and I urge you to try different ones of your own.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Number three, boiling and blanching.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Boiling is the method of cooking food in, well, boiling water.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It could also be stock until it's cooked to your desired consistency.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Blanching is similar.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Typically, what happens is it goes in the boiling water and then as soon as it's done,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: it comes out and immediately is plunged into an ice water bath.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Why? To stop the process of cooking and shock and refresh the item that it is you're cooking.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: What it'll do is retain color in vegetables and also keep the vegetables from overcooking.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Make sure you take it out at the right time and what you're really looking for is when it goes in that ice bath,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: there is enough ice that it doesn't melt.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Something to look out for.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Number four, grilling.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's a form of cooking that involves heat applied to the surface of food.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It usually involves a significant amount of direct radiant heat.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Could be firewood, could be propane, etc.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: How do you know you're properly grilling something?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Me personally, I like to grill aggressively.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That means I'm looking for a lot of color.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The best way to do it is have an offset setup.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: One side is really hot and one side is completely off.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That way, whenever you're done getting nice grill marks and char on the food that you're cooking,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: if it's not cooked through, you can scoot it over to the cold side,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: close your lid and let it continue until that is cooked through to your desired internal temperature.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Number five, braising.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Braising is a combination cooking method that uses both wet and dry heats.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Typically, the food is first browned at a high temperature,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: then simmered in a covered pot in cooking liquids such as wine, broth, coconut milk.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The meat does not get fully submerged in the liquid.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You're going to want it three quarters of the way up the meat.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: This also depends on the length of braising.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: If you're only braising for like maybe one, two hours, I'd say like halfway up should be enough.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You can either cook it until the meat falls apart and it's super duper tender.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But if it's a leaner meat or a very delicate meat like a fish,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: then you can just braise it till it's just cooked through.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The second element is the liquid it cooked in.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It has now become a beautifully flavorful broth.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You can then turn that broth into a sauce or you can just serve it straight up with that loose broth.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That's nice.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Number six, searing.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Searing is a technique in which the surface of the food, usually meat,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: is cooked at a very high temperature until a browned crust forms, also called the Maillard reaction.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Get a pan, set it over medium high heat, add oil, just enough to coat the surface of the pan.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Let it get extremely hot till nearly smoking.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Add in your protein, for example, this steak.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Make sure it makes full contact with the pan.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Let it sear for two to three minutes, flip, and then another two to three minutes.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: This classic formula of medium high heat, two to three minutes per side,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: has worked for every single piece of protein I have ever cooked in my entire life.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Once the food is seared, if the inside is not cooked through,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: you can always lower the heat and then continuously flip until the food is cooked from the inside.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Or you can pop it in a low temperature oven at around 350 Fahrenheit

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: until the internal doneness is achieved.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Number seven, frying.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: I could simplify frying into one sentence, honestly.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: A high temperature cooking oil, around 350 Fahrenheit, you put food in there, you're frying.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: What I'm saying is you can fry anything like that, bread it or not.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Vegetables like Brussels sprouts fry tremendously without breading.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now, if you want something extra crispy, then you would bread it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: If you're breading it, you want to make sure that it's evenly coated in the breading,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: there's no bald spots, and once it goes in the oil, you want to see nice, even bubbling.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Not excessively violent, no crazy popping.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And when it comes out, the inside should be cooked through

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: and the outside should be a beautiful golden brown and crisp, not soggy.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: If you want to learn more about how to fry anything,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: then you should watch our how to fry everything video.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The link will be in the description for that.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: There are tons of other cooking techniques, but to me,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: these are some of the most important baseline ones that'll get you started

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: and give you the ability to cook most general things.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Things get more specific and advanced in technique after you master this level.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Next up, sauces.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: What is a sauce?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Sauces are liquids, creams, or semi-solid foods served on or used in preparing other foods.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Most sauces are not normally consumed by themselves,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: but they add flavor and texture and visual appeal.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So technically speaking, anything could be a sauce.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But I'll give you a basic example.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: If you're American, think about ketchup.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Do you just spoon ketchup in your mouth?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: No!

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You use it to dip things into, you use it on top of things.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now, back in the day, we would commonly identify the mother sauces.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's good to know your mother sauces and you should research them.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Can I remember all of them?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Velouté, Espanol, Salsa Tamale, Bechamel, and Hollandaise.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's good to know them, but unless you work in a traditional French restaurant,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: you're probably going to end up using really any kind of a sauce that you can to make good flavor.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But what we can learn from the French mother sauces is the principles of why sauce is important,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: how it should be utilized.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And there's really two things that chefs often look for, but they're not the end all be all.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And that is, number one, adding a lot of flavor.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: If you're not going to do that,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: you might as well just pour water on top of a steak and call it a day.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Number two, and this depends on the application,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: but generally a sauce should have some level of viscosity to it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Why? Because it needs to cling to the dish or the food that it is on

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: and you get that nice coating of the sauce.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Some sauces are naturally thick, but more often than not,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: chefs are constantly trying to find a way to adapt sauces to their dish.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: If those are the things that chefs are looking for,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: what's their first step into making a sauce?

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Well, they look at the dish and they find ways to give their sauce shape and purpose.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So here's a couple of ways.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: There's thickening a sauce and there's emulsifying one.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: These are not the only ways.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Emulsions.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: They help blend flavors together in a synchronous bite.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Maybe you want a special color, have it coat your palate in a certain way.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Emulsifying is the key, but emulsifications can be challenging.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: A broken sauce versus a smooth sauce is substantially different.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: A broken sauce is usually not going to have the flavor nice

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: and evenly distributed throughout the sauce.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And also it won't cling to your food properly.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: In emulsified sauce, on the other hand,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: even distributed flavor clings to your food so that when you dip something

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: or it's coated in a sauce, you pick it up and it's going to carry that sauce

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: with whatever vegetable meat carbohydrate into your mouth to then act as a vehicle

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: for that flavor. Emulsions. Good.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Another way to look at that is thickening sauces.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: There's many ways to make a sauce thick.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Fun fact, emulsifying also thickens a sauce, but you can also reduce,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: you know, something like a red wine sauce for a standing rib roast.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Reducing is literally boiling the sauce or simmering the sauce until you've

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: evaporated the water out.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So you've intensified flavor, you've thickened it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And sometimes it looks a little more desirable.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You can add gelatin.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You can blend in a hydrocolloid like xanthan gum.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Science has made it so that any sauce can be whatever you want.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Chefs and great cooks will find a way, but listen, anything can be a sauce.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Hollandaise is a sauce.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So is a mixture of sugar, fish sauce, lime juice.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It's liquidy, but it's a sauce.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And it might be good for a raw fish dish like a hamachi crudo,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: where it would soak into the fish rather than cling to it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So it's okay that it's liquidy.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Make things flavorful.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Make them coat things well.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Find a way to get it in people's mouths and make it taste good.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Next up, cooking meat.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: There are really only two ways to cook meat.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Hot and fast or low and slow.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Hot and fast is exactly what it sounds like.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The goal is to achieve color on it on both sides.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And hopefully by the time you flipped it over and gotten color on the other side.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So in the case of a steak, that thing is cooked to the desired temperature

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: or maybe needs a few more minutes flipped back and forth.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And then it's done, done, done.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Now there's slow and low.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The temperature is going to be very low.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And you're going to cook that item very slowly because the temperature is lower.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You're going to avoid burning anything on the outside

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: while very slowly cooking the internals of that product.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: What will happen with a protein is that if it's high fat,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: high intramuscular fiber, it'll get nice and tender and fall apart succulent.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Cooking meat is about temperature and understanding the qualities of each cut

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: and why they need to be treated differently to reach their full potential.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: These are the temperatures you need on most pieces of meat.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Really, the goal with slow cooking is to cook something past well done

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: slowly enough while you're preserving the juices,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: but to a high enough temperature that the gelatin

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: and intramuscular fibers essentially melt.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: For example, you can cook a chuck roast to 135 and get medium rare, but it's too chewy.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So you really need the time and temperature

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: where the intramuscular fibers are actually being melted properly,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: which is going to be between 200 degrees and 205 degrees Fahrenheit.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: That'll be enough to be easily shredded with a fork.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So first, figure out if you need to slow cook or not.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Identify your desired outcome.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Choose your method braising, grilling, searing, etc.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And pay attention to the thickness of your meat.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: If it's really thick, for example, a thick steak,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: you may need to use two methods of cooking

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: to get the internal cooked before you get color on the outside.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So for example, you might need to put it in an oven

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: to cook the internal temperature closer to 130 or 135 and then sear it.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: The meat is thicker than usual.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You likely will only get color on the outside by searing it without cooking the inside.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: This is obviously considering a steak.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: Technically speaking, you'll hear a lot of things

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: that certain meats need to be cooked a certain way.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And that's the end of the story.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: And the simple reality is that's not exactly true.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: You can cook any piece of meat, however the f*** you want,

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: assuming that it's safe to eat at that temperature.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: But each thing is going to have a different outcome.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: It depends on if that outcome is desirable to you or not.

chunks.title: Learn How To Cook in Under 25 Minutes
chunks.text: So I'll give you two examples.
